theme_archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Neo-Brutalist Contrast (Light Theme)
design_philosophy: A career platform tailored for job seekers and students, optimizing for approachability (pastels) but maintaining structure and authority (high-contrast neo-brutalist borders and offset shadows). Avoids the typical 'clinical SaaS' look.

body.font: Satoshi, IBM Plex Sans, or DM Sans

spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Neo-Brutalism: Elements have a 2px or 3px solid black border (border-2 border-foreground) and hard black offset shadows (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]). Active/hover states translate down and right, removing the shadow to simulate pressing.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground border-2 border-foreground shadow-[4px_4px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:translate-x-[2px] hover:translate-y-[2px] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] active:translate-x-[4px] active:translate-y-[4px] active:shadow-none transition-all font-bold px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground border-2 border-foreground shadow-[4px_4px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:translate-x-[2px] hover:translate-y-[2px] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-all font-bold px-6 py-3

cards.default: bg-card border-2 border-foreground shadow-[6px_6px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] rounded-none p-6
cards.interactive: bg-card border-2 border-foreground shadow-[6px_6px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[8px_8px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-all rounded-none p-6 cursor-pointer

inputs.default: bg-white border-2 border-foreground px-4 py-3 focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none focus:border-foreground focus:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] rounded-none text-base transition-all
inputs.upload_dropzone: border-4 border-dashed border-foreground bg-accent/20 hover:bg-accent/40 p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center cursor-pointer transition-colors shadow-[4px_4px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]

data_viz.score_dial: Use bold SVG circular progress with thick strokes (12px+). Stroke color based on score: Red (<50), Yellow (50-79), Mint Green (80+). Center text is large and bold.

components_strategy.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='upload-resume-button').

landing_page.hero: Asymmetric layout. Left side: Massive H1 ('Crack the Code to Your Career'), subheadline, and Primary CTA ('Analyze Resume Now'). Right side: A 3D-like stack of brutalist cards (using images from media_assets) floating slightly.
landing_page.value_prop: A marquee (react-fast-marquee) running across the screen with thick black borders, displaying 'ATS OPTIMIZED • AI INTERVIEWS • REAL-TIME REWRITE • JOB MATCHING'.
landing_page.features: Bento grid of 4 major features. Each card uses a distinct pastel background (mint, lavender, yellow, white) with a solid black border.

auth_pages.layout: Split screen. Left side: Solid pastel background with an inspiring career quote. Right side: Login/Register form inside a massive brutalist card.

dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (black background, white text for contrast, or white with thick right border). Main content area uses a 'Control Room' dense grid but styled playfully.
dashboard.feature_grid: Grid of interactive cards for Resume Upload, Interview Prep, Resume Compare, Suggested Jobs, Roadmap, Career Advisor, Interview History, Job Matcher, Profile.

resume_upload_ats_analysis.layout: Two-column after upload. Left: The massive upload dropzone or PDF preview. Right: The Scorecard. A huge score dial at the top, followed by 3 accordion sections (Pros, Cons, Suggested Changes).

real_time_resume_rewriter.layout: Three-pane or vertical split. Top: Input area for Job Description. Middle: Original Resume Viewer. Bottom/Right: Live AI rewrite output in a distinct highlighted box (pale yellow bg) with an 'Accept & Download' button.

mock_interview_scorecard.layout: Certificate-style layout. Thick borders. Contains 4 metric dials (Communication, Technical, Confidence, Improvement). A 'Download PDF' floating action button.
mock_interview_scorecard.visuals: Use ASCII art or simple bold icons to represent each metric (e.g., a lightning bolt for technical accuracy).

skills_role_fit.layout: Input area for comma-separated skills (styled as tags). Below, a list of 'Recommended Roles' cards. Clicking a role reveals a 'Skills to Learn' checklist.

job_suggestions.layout: A vertical feed of jobs. Each job is a wide, flat card with a 'Match Score' badge on the top right. High-contrast Apply buttons.

profile.layout: Header with avatar and basic info. Below, tabs (using Shadcn Tabs customized with brutalist styles) for 'Saved Jobs', 'Interview History', and 'Account Settings'.

hero_images.description: laptop computer beside coffee mug - use for landing page hero background or feature section
person using MacBook Pro and holding cappuccino

interview_images.description: two women sitting on chair (professional interview)
a woman sitting at a table with a piece of paper (reviewing resume)

technical_instructions.components: Custom HTML/Tailwind for Landing Page. Customized Shadcn components for Dashboard (Tables, Tabs, Accordion).
technical_instructions.motion: Use CSS transitions for hover effects. Avoid excessive staggered animations; focus on snappy, tactile interactions.
